caption: The video captures a significant event celebrating the foundation day of the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP). The scene is split into two frames: on the left, a prominent figure, likely a key leader or Prime Minister, is seen addressing the audience with a passionate speech. He is dressed in traditional attire, adorned with an orange and green scarf, and stands against a backdrop filled with BJP logos. On the right, a large gathering of party members and supporters, all wearing matching orange caps and scarves, listen attentively and applaud enthusiastically. The atmosphere is vibrant and celebratory, reflecting the unity and enthusiasm of the party. The event is being broadcast live, as indicated by the social media handles and website links displayed at the bottom of the screen.
